race.description: Jericho Cup Anzac Long Weekend Maiden
race.comment: I LOVE YA MONEY (3) is on debut for the Fiore stable with Lucy in the saddle, as she was in this gelding's latest trial at Belmont. He looks to have some ability in his recent outings and the draw is perfect for him. Can make an immediate statement. PEIGI (10) is another debutant, this time for the local Steve Wolfe barn. Her latest outing at this track was solid and there's not a lot to be running scared of in the raced brigade. May need some luck from the draw, but he can put his best foot forward in what looks a suitable maiden. DARK OPAL (4) comes through a good maiden at Bunbury last time out in what's turned out to be a strong form race. She's been back to the trials in the break where she was impressive and she has a few ratings - including fresh last campaign - that suggest a race like this is well within her grasp. STARCHASER (5) gets the blinkers on for the new stable and can play a leading role. WE LOVE CHARLIE (11) won't be far away on resumption.
